gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor leans forward slightly and gestures with both hands as if inviting the class to consider the question
a person raises both arms with excitement and smiles broadly while encouraging everyone to join in the discovery
a tutor steps to the side and uses hands to create a visual barrier, illustrating four distinct groups with clear movements
a person tilts their head slightly and raises a hand to their chin in thought while asking about the sums of the groups
a tutor enthusiastically extends their arms forward, encouraging students to participate as they ask for the answer
a person gestures invitingly with both palms up while explaining how to use arrays or addition for the multiplication
a tutor claps their hands together and smiles widely as they announce that four times seven equals twenty-eight
a person nods appreciatively while spreading their hands outward to emphasize the concept of groups being added together
